$comment: Project-level Claude Code settings for claude-code-routines. Committed (operator-specific settings live in .claude/settings.local.json, which is gitignored). The PostToolUse hook below nudges Claude to invoke the deploy-routine-changes skill whenever a routines/*.prompt.md file is touched, because the GHA deploy workflow is currently disabled (see .github/workflows/deploy-routines.yml and the skill SKILL.md for the full story).

hooks.command: jq -r 'if ((.tool_input.file_path // "") | test("routines/([^/]+\\.prompt\\.md|_common/[^/]+\\.md)$")) then "Routine source edited (a routines/*.prompt.md file or a routines/_common/ partial — partial edits affect every routine that includes them). The GHA deploy workflow is disabled — invoke the project skill at .claude/skills/deploy-routine-changes/SKILL.md before ending the session, so the cloud routine bodies stay in sync via RemoteTrigger (the skill renders includes via scripts/render-routine.sh before deploying)." else empty end' >&2
